title: Meta's $27 billion AI data center is transforming rural Louisiana
author: Fox 8 Live
notes: Covers scale of Hyperion investment and community transformation in Richland Parish.

title: How much water will Meta's Louisiana data center use? New details unveiled for first time.
author: nola.com / The Times-Picayune
notes: First detailed reporting on water consumption figures: 500-600 MGal/yr, Mississippi Alluvial Aquifer draw, well flagging in July 2024.

title: Meta's $10 billion Louisiana data center is getting $3.3 billion in tax breaks
author: Fortune
notes: Detailed breakdown of the 20-year sales and use tax exemption on GPU equipment.

title: Louisiana approves power plan for giant Meta AI data center
author: nola.com / The Times-Picayune
notes: Reports on the LPSC 4-1 vote approving three Entergy gas plants. Notes Commissioner Lewis dissent.

title: Entergy seeks $237M in tax relief for Meta data center
author: AOL / Industry Report
notes: Covers Entergy's ITEP filing for gas plant infrastructure serving Meta.

title: Amazon says it will limit water use, pay for power at $12 billion NW Louisiana data centers
author: Louisiana Illuminator
notes: Key article on the concessions Amazon negotiated vs. Meta's terms. Useful comparative case.

title: As larger AI Data Centers race into Louisiana, new report finds rate payers could be left with half the cost
author: Lincoln Parish Journal
notes: Reports on stranded asset risk analysis for Louisiana ratepayers.

title: Data centers spark fears of a 'Digital Cancer Alley' in Louisiana
author: The Lens
notes: Foundational framing piece connecting datacenter proliferation to Cancer Alley sacrifice zone logic.

title: Meta's Mega Data Center Could Strain Louisiana's Grid — and Entergy Isn't Prepared
author: Alliance for Affordable Energy
notes: AAE watchdog analysis of grid strain risk. Key advocacy source.

title: The Thirstiest of Us All: Data Centers and the Impact of Their Unsustainable Water Use
author: Tulane Water Law Center
notes: Tulane Water Law Center analysis of datacenter water use impacts in Louisiana context.

title: Louisiana's Data Center Incentives: Big Promises, Bigger Questions
author: Invest Louisiana
notes: Critical analysis of incentive programs, job promise vs. reality.
